rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (core contradiction: per-node embeddings vs. 'fully inductive').
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (evidence gaps relative to the claims).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (downstream-harm avoidance).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not (provenance and traceability).
